description_long: This factory building features a rectangular, two-level structure with a flat roof and a prominent set of three tall smokestacks rising from the upper section. The exterior is finished in a muted red color with large, industrial-style windows on all sides, allowing ample natural light into the workspace. The roof is equipped with multiple skylights and visible rooftop machinery, including vents and HVAC units, indicating active industrial use. The front facade includes two large loading dock doors and a main entrance, both designed for easy access by personnel and vehicles. Yellow ductwork and metallic details add to the utilitarian, modern industrial aesthetic. The building sits on a broad concrete base, providing stability and a clear perimeter for operational safety.
description: A modern industrial factory building with red walls, large windows, three smokestacks, rooftop machinery, and multiple skylights. The structure includes loading dock doors and a main entrance, all set on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing three smokestacks, two large loading dock doors, a main entrance, and several rooftop skylights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three smokestacks, yellow ductwork, and a wide array of industrial windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying smaller windows, the back of the smokestacks, and a less prominent entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the rooftop machinery, skylights, and large industrial windows.
